title: JOYRX MENTORSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: CHILDREN'S CANCER ASSOCIATION JOYRX MENTORSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Pairs seriously ill children and teens undergoing treatment with trained adult volunteer mentors. Mentors provide companionship through shared activities such as games, music, and hobbies. This support also gives parents valuable time to meet with doctors, connect with family and friends, or simply take a needed break. 1200 NW Naito Parkway Suite 140 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Families with children in treatment for cancer or other serious illnesses ages 0-18 at Randall Children's Hospital at Legacy Emanuel or Doernbecher Children's Hospital Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-1:30pm. Mentors meet with families based on both parties' schedules. Email (503) 200-5113 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 244-3141 Main phone Intake (503) 200-5113 Kacy Smerke Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: One block from the Portland Streetcar stop and close to TriMet bus lines Services: Mentoring Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - CARING CABIN INFORMATION SERVICES - KIDS' CANCER PAGES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHILDREN'S CANCER ASSOCIATION
